title: azorella schizeilema
intro: Azorella schizeilema, also known as 'Anchusa', is a perennial plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with the leaves and roots being utilized in herbal preparations. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. Azorella schizeilema is often used in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote overall health and well-being.
